name: agribound
summary: Agribound: Unified agricultural field boundary delineation from satellite imagery using geospatial foundation models, pre-trained segmentation, and embeddings.
author: Sayantan Majumdar, Justin L. Huntington, Peter ReVelle, Soheil Nozari, Ryan G. Smith, M. F. Hasan, Matt Bromley, Jayden Atkin, Jeremy Rapp, Eric R. Jensen, David Ketchum, Samapriya Roy
